query:
INSERT INTO agents (ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, capabilities, endpointUrl, averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, domain, isBuiltIn, version)
VALUES (
  1,
  'Force Majeure Contract Agent',
  'AgenThinkMesh Legal Intelligence',
  'Extracts force majeure clauses from PDF/DOCX contracts (Arabic & English), assesses GCC conflict triggers (Hormuz disruption, infrastructure attacks), drafts a formal notification letter, and produces a board-ready risk summary with Red/Amber/Green verdict.',
  '["clause_extraction","trigger_assessment","notification_drafting","risk_summary","arabic_rtl","pdf_export","gcc_conflict_intelligence"]',
  '/api/agents/force-majeure',
  8000,
  'free',
  'active',
  true,
  'Legal',
  true,
  '1.0.0'
);
